task_completion.description: Verify that a new address book named 'External Vendors' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left pane of the Thunderbird Address Book window, there should be a distinct entry named 'External Vendors'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 3 external vendor contacts are present in the 'External Vendors' address book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When 'External Vendors' is selected in the left pane, the right pane should list the contacts: j.kaminski@yahoo.com, vkaminski@aol.com, and shirley.crenshaw@wcom.com.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 3 external vendor contacts are no longer in the 'Personal Address Book'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When 'Personal Address Book' is selected in the left pane, j.kaminski@yahoo.com, vkaminski@aol.com, and shirley.crenshaw@wcom.com should NOT be visible in the contact list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the internal @enron.com contacts remain untouched in the 'Personal Address Book'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When 'Personal Address Book' is selected, the @enron.com contacts (e.g., kenneth.lay@enron.com, jeffrey.skilling@enron.com) should still be visible in the contact list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Thunderbird Address Book window is closed at the end of the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final screenshots, the Thunderbird Address Book window should no longer be visible on the screen.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Thunderbird GUI rather than using terminal commands to modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Thunderbird Address Book interface being clicked and manipulated, not a terminal window executing sqlite3 or bash commands.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely moved the contacts using the application's features.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show contacts being dragged and dropped into the new address book, or the contact properties dialog being used to change the address book assignment.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to manually edit Thunderbird configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) should be open modifying Thunderbird profile files (like prefs.js or abook.sqlite).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected new address book name is exactly 'External Vendors'. The 3 target contacts to be moved are: j.kaminski@yahoo.com, vkaminski@aol.com, and shirley.crenshaw@wcom.com. The 9 internal contacts that must remain untouched in the 'Personal Address Book' are: kenneth.lay@enron.com, jeffrey.skilling@enron.com, andrew.fastow@enron.com, richard.causey@enron.com, rebecca.mark@enron.com, lou.pai@enron.com, cliff.baxter@enron.com, sherron.watkins@enron.com, and amanda.martin@enron.com.
